animeStory2Codes.title: Anime Story 2 Codes
animeStory2Codes.intro: Redeem active Anime Story 2 codes first to boost summons, traits, and early upgrades.

cards.name: Active Rewards
cards.description: Claim the newest active codes for Gems, Trait Tokens, Secret Orbs, and Summon Tickets before each play session.

cards.name: Redeem Steps
cards.description: Open Anime Story 2 in Roblox, tap Codes, paste an active code exactly, and press Claim.

cards.name: Code Fixes
cards.description: If a code fails, rejoin a fresh server, check case-sensitive spelling, and confirm the code has not expired.

animeStory2BeginnerGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Beginner Guide
animeStory2BeginnerGuide.intro: Use this checklist to build a stable early team, save resources, and unlock faster progression.

steps.title: Claim Codes and Daily Rewards
steps.description: Start with free resources so your first summons and upgrades are efficient.

steps.title: Build One Carry Unit First
steps.description: Focus levels and materials on your best early DPS instead of splitting upgrades.

steps.title: Push Story Stages
steps.description: Clear worlds to unlock better farming zones, game modes, and material drops.

steps.title: Save Gems for Strong Banners
steps.description: Spend on banners that improve your core team roles rather than random pulls.

animeStory2TierList.title: Anime Story 2 Tier List
animeStory2TierList.intro: Prioritize units by role value and consistency across story, raids, and tower content.

tiers.name: Core Carry Picks
tiers.description: High damage units with reliable clear speed in most game modes.

tiers.name: Flexible Team Units
tiers.description: Strong picks for mixed comps that still scale deep into progression.

tiers.name: Starter Bridge Units
tiers.description: Useful early options while you farm for better mythic or secret upgrades.

animeStory2UnitsGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Units Guide
animeStory2UnitsGuide.intro: Sort units by rarity and role so you can decide where to invest each material tier.

groups.name: Rare and Epic Units
groups.description: Temporary fillers for early worlds until stronger summons replace them.

groups.name: Legendary and Mythic Units
groups.description: Primary progression core with better scaling and trait value.

groups.name: Secret and Exclusive Units
groups.description: Late-game anchors worth premium resources, ascension items, and evolution materials.

animeStory2TraitsRerolls.title: Anime Story 2 Traits and Rerolls Guide
animeStory2TraitsRerolls.intro: Compare every listed trait, see what each buff does, and choose when to spend Trait Tokens on rerolls.

traits.name: Vigor III
traits.rerollAdvice: Usable on a durable slot, but not a final DPS trait.

traits.name: Berserk
traits.rerollAdvice: Strong practical stop for most damage carries.

traits.name: Solar
traits.rerollAdvice: Stop rerolling unless you are chasing Monarch on a top-tier unit.

traits.name: Dead Eye
traits.rerollAdvice: Stop on any serious crit carry.

traits.name: Ethereal
traits.rerollAdvice: Stop on your main damage unit unless you are specifically chasing Monarch.

traits.name: Monarch
traits.buff: +25% Critical Chance, +50% Critical Damage, +75% Health, and +75% Damage
traits.rerollAdvice: Keep permanently on any important unit.

animeStory2WorldsProgression.title: Anime Story 2 Worlds and Stage Progression
animeStory2WorldsProgression.intro: Follow the world unlock path, check estimated Combat Power ranges, and know which Stage VII drops are worth farming.

steps.name: Green Planet
steps.description: 55-1.33K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Green Shard to craft Dragon Ball and support Vogita (Blue) evolution.

steps.name: Desert
steps.description: 2.05K-6.07K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Orange Shard to craft Kunai for early critical chance builds.

steps.name: Double Dungeon
steps.description: 6.8K-13.3K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Blue Shard to craft Elixir when your team needs survivability.

steps.name: Titan City
steps.description: 14K-18.8K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Grey Shard to craft Grapple Hook on your mid-game crit path.

steps.name: Beach Harbor
steps.description: 19K-33.2K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Yellow Shard to craft Strawhat for health scaling.

steps.name: Gold District
steps.description: 34K-44.1K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Red Shard to craft Katana before deeper progression.

steps.name: Realm Seven
steps.description: 59K-64.8K Combat Power. Stage III can drop Wrath or Nightbane while Stage VII farms Pride and Dawnrender.

steps.name: Snow Village
steps.description: 60.8K-99.3K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Purple Shard to craft Flame Sword relic.

steps.name: Heroic City
steps.description: 78.6K-171K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Brown Shard used in Baseball Bat plus Coal and Candy recipes.

steps.name: Rome
steps.description: 63K-170K Combat Power. Farm Stage VII for Unbreaking Diamond to evolve Golden Wind.

animeStory2RelicsItemsEvolution.title: Anime Story 2 Relics Items and Evolution Materials
animeStory2RelicsItemsEvolution.intro: Track relic recipes, shard sources, evolution materials, and key upgrade items for stronger team progression.

items.name: Dragon Ball / Kunai / Elixir
items.description: Early relic route: Green, Orange, and Blue Shards from Stage VII worlds for damage, crit, and health setups.

items.name: Grapple Hook / Strawhat / Katana
items.description: Mid-game relic route: Grey, Yellow, and Red Shards from Titan City, Beach Harbor, and Gold District.

items.name: Flame Sword / Baseball Bat / Demon Ring
items.description: Late-game relic route: Purple, Brown, and Pink Shard plans for stronger crit, damage, and health scaling.

items.name: Coal / Candy Hybrid Relics
items.description: Combine Purple and Brown Shards for defensive or offensive hybrid relic options.

items.name: Trait Tokens and Stat Chips
items.description: Use upgrade items from codes, quests, challenges, and shops to reroll traits and optimize unit stats.

items.name: Ascend Tickets and Evolution Items
items.description: Prioritize evolution materials from raid shops for long-term core units before spending on side projects.

animeStory2RaidsTowerEvents.title: Anime Story 2 Raids Tower and Events Guide
animeStory2RaidsTowerEvents.intro: Use late-game modes to farm rerolls, raid tokens, evolution materials, Slime Tokens, Ascension Items, and limited rewards.

faqs.question: How should I run Anime Story 2 Tower of Ascension efficiently?
faqs.answer: Push milestone floors first for loop rewards, then continue deeper only when your team can clear quickly and safely.

faqs.question: What is the best way to spend Anime Story 2 raid tokens?
faqs.answer: Choose the raid shop tied to your target evolution material first, then avoid splitting tokens across unrelated upgrades.

faqs.question: When should I focus Anime Story 2 Slime Apocalypse rewards?
faqs.answer: Farm event currency during the active window and buy Ascension Items, Trait Tokens, and Stat Chips before optional banner rolls.

faqs.question: Why should I redeem Anime Story 2 update codes before farming?
faqs.answer: Update rewards can cover rerolls, orbs, gems, and event tokens, so you can reduce grind and target your next upgrade faster.

faq.title: Anime Story 2 Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for Anime Story 2 progression, summons, and game modes.

questions.question: How do I redeem Anime Story 2 codes?
questions.answer: Open Anime Story 2 in Roblox, tap Codes, paste an active code, and claim rewards immediately.

questions.question: What should I do first in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Claim active codes, build one carry unit, and push story worlds to unlock better farming.

questions.question: How do traits work in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Traits add role-specific bonuses, so reroll tokens should be focused on core units only.

questions.question: When should I farm raids in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Farm raids after your story core is stable and your team can clear consistently.

cta.title: Ready to Progress in Anime Story 2?
cta.description: Use the Anime Story 2 wiki modules to plan summons, upgrades, and late-game farming paths.
